name: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood
overview: Follow the young, hip-hop elite as they strive to either “make” or “maintain” a life in the La La Land of Hollywood! From hip-hop artists, to video vixens, to actors, personal assistants, girlfriends, and co-parents, we take an exclusive look behind the curtain at the lives of the hip-hop couples as they struggle to balance their careers and their personal lives.

trailers.title: Love & Hip Hop: Hollywood | Season 4 Official Super Trailer | Returns Monday July 24 8/7c
